proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +32.6pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
R-multiple 0.61 reflects Day-6 forced-exit dominance (project_anchor §7 D-8) — true edge may revise downward once exit logic changes
Cohort has been promoted continuously for ~20 days without trader engagement on a Bear regime — risk of stale approval if regime never returns
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +32.6pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +32.6pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 42 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-17) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: UP_TRI × Metal: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, sector=Metal (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +26.2pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.72 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Portfolio is 100% Choppy-concentrated with UP_TRI dominating (28 of 42 open); any further UP_TRI boost should be monitored for compounding correlated drawdown risk if Choppy regime breaks
R-multiple 0.72 remains under D-8 review per project_anchor §7; sustained Day-6 forced-exit dominance could erode the edge
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +26.2pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +26.2pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies UP_TRI exposure (28 of 42 open) in a 100% Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-17) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime = Choppy (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime = Choppy; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI or Choppy×DOWN_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier W or higher, or (b) regime concentration drops below 0.80 via natural Day-6 exits. Prioritize allowing UP_TRI×Choppy×IT (6 positions) and DOWN_TRI×Choppy×Energy (5 positions) clusters to decay before adding to either bucket.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bull regime flip would simultaneously invalidate 13 DOWN_TRI shorts (31% of book) while a Choppy→Bear flip would invalidate 28 UP_TRI longs (67% of book). Neither side has statistical edge support, so the entire 42-position book is a single regime bet with no validated cohort to justify the directional skew.

evidence: regime_concentration.triggered=true with observed=1.0 (42/42 positions in Choppy)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort is Candidate tier (n=109) — unvalidated edge
Matched Choppy×DOWN_TRI cohort is Candidate tier (n=59) — unvalidated edge
Top cell UP_TRI×Choppy×IT at 14.29% (below 20% cell threshold)
UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 28/42 = 66.7% (below 85% threshold)
Mixed directional book (28 UP_TRI vs 13 DOWN_TRI) means a Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear flip dislocates one side without offset
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI or Choppy×DOWN_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier W or higher, or (b) regime concentration drops below 0.80 via natural Day-6 exits. Prioritize allowing UP_TRI×Choppy×IT (6 positions) and DOWN_TRI×Choppy×Energy (5 positions) clusters to decay before adding to either bucket.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bull regime flip would simultaneously invalidate 13 DOWN_TRI shorts (31% of book) while a Choppy→Bear flip would invalidate 28 UP_TRI longs (67% of book). Neither side has statistical edge support, so the entire 42-position book is a single regime bet with no validated cohort to justify the directional skew.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above the 0.80 threshold) and both matched Choppy×UP_TRI (n=109) and Choppy×DOWN_TRI (n=59) cohorts sit only at Candidate tier — unvalidated edge. No single cell breaches 20% (top is UP_TRI×Choppy×IT at 14.29%) and UP_TRI share at 28/42 = 66.7% is below 85%, but the regime concentration alone with unvalidated cohort support warrants warn — a Choppy regime flip would unwind the entire 42-position book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
